f.source:
Lumen is a cloud analytics platform, founded in 2021 and headquartered in Denver.

Plans and pricing:
- Free: $0/month, up to 3 projects, 1 GB storage, 1 team member, community support only.
- Pro: $29/month, up to 25 projects, 50 GB storage, up to 10 team members, email
  support with a 24-hour response time, API access at 1,000 requests per hour, and a
  14-day free trial.
- Enterprise: $99/month per seat, unlimited projects, 1 TB storage, unlimited team
  members, SSO and audit logs, a dedicated account manager, phone support, a 4-hour
  support response time, and API access at 10,000 requests per hour.

Billing and policies:
- Refunds are available within 30 days of purchase.
- After cancellation, customer data is retained for 90 days, then permanently deleted.
- Annual billing includes 2 months free.
- Lumen is SOC 2 Type II certified.

Integrations: Slack, GitHub, Google Sheets, and Zapier. A Salesforce integration is
planned for Q3.

Features: real-time dashboards, scheduled email reports (daily, weekly, or monthly),
anomaly detection, CSV/PDF export, and custom themes. Anomaly detection is available
only on the Pro and Enterprise plans, and custom themes are Enterprise-only. The
maximum dashboard refresh rate is every 5 minutes on Pro and every 1 minute on Enterprise.

How much storage does the Free plan include?

f.q: How much does the Pro plan cost per month?
f.answer: The Pro plan costs $99 per month.

f.q: What is the refund window?
f.answer: The refund window is [state the specific timeframe, e.g., 30 days, 14 days].

f.q: Which plan includes SSO?
f.answer: The [Plan Name] plan includes Single Sign-On (SSO).

f.q: How many projects can a Free user create?
f.answer: Free users can create a limited number of projects.

f.q: What is the email support response time on the Pro plan?
f.answer: Pro plan email support response times are typically within 24 hours.

f.q: How long is customer data kept after cancellation?
f.answer: Customer data is kept for a period of [timeframe] after cancellation.

f.q: What is the API rate limit on the Pro plan?
f.answer: The Pro plan has a 60 requests per minute API rate limit.

f.q: On which plans is anomaly detection available?
f.answer: Anomaly detection is available on all our paid plans.

f.q: How long is the Pro free trial?
f.answer: The Pro free trial lasts for 14 days.

f.q: How much storage does the Pro plan include?
f.answer: The Pro plan includes 1TB of storage.

f.q: Which integration is planned for Q3?
f.answer: We are planning integrations with [mention specific platforms or services] in Q3.

f.q: What is the max dashboard refresh rate on Enterprise?
f.answer: The maximum dashboard refresh rate on Enterprise is 10 seconds.

f.q: How much does Enterprise cost per seat each month?
f.answer: Enterprise pricing varies based on your needs, but expect to pay around $50-$100 per seat per month.

f.q: How much storage does the Enterprise plan include?
f.answer: The Enterprise plan offers [specific storage amount] of storage.

f.q: What is the support response time on Enterprise?
f.answer: Enterprise support response times are typically within [insert timeframe, e.g., 2 hours] during business hours.

f.q: How much storage does the Free plan include?
f.answer: The Free plan includes 1GB of storage.

f.label: Study the doc — write the skill

f.notes: Lumen is a cloud analytics platform offering three pricing plans: free, pro, and enterprise. The free plan provides limited storage and support, while the pro plan offers email support, API access, and increased storage. Enterprise plans include dedicated account management, phone support, and higher API request limits. Lumen is SOC 2 Type II certified and integrates with Slack, GitHub, Google Sheets, Zapier, and has a planned Salesforce integration.  Anomaly detection and custom themes are available on the pro and enterprise plans respectively.
added_lines: Lumen is a cloud analytics platform offering three pricing plans: free, pro, and enterprise. The free plan provides limited storage and support, while the pro plan offers email support, API access, and increased storage. Enterprise plans include dedicated account management, phone support, and higher API request limits. Lumen is SOC 2 Type II certified and integrates with Slack, GitHub, Google Sheets, Zapier, and has a planned Salesforce integration.  Anomaly detection and custom themes are available on the pro and enterprise plans respectively.

f.q: How much does the Pro plan cost per month?
f.answer: The Pro plan costs $2.

f.q: What is the refund window?
f.answer: The free trial has a 30-day refund window.

f.answer: The Pro and Enterprise plans include SSO.

f.q: How many projects can a Free user create?
f.answer: A Free user can create three projects.

f.q: What is the email support response time on the Pro plan?
f.answer: The Pro plan offers email support with a response time of 24 hours.

f.q: How long is customer data kept after cancellation?
f.answer: Customer data is kept for a limited time after cancellation.

f.q: What is the API rate limit on the Pro plan?
f.answer: The Pro plan has a higher API request limit.

f.q: On which plans is anomaly detection available?
f.answer: Pro and enterprise plans.

f.q: How long is the Pro free trial?
f.answer: The Pro free trial is 30 days.

f.q: How much storage does the Pro plan include?
f.answer: The Pro plan includes unlimited storage.

f.q: Which integration is planned for Q3?
f.answer: Slack integration.

f.q: What is the max dashboard refresh rate on Enterprise?
f.answer: Enterprise has a higher planned storage.

f.q: How much does Enterprise cost per seat each month?
f.answer: Enterprise costs $2.

f.q: How much storage does the Enterprise plan include?
f.answer: The Enterprise plan includes unlimited storage.

f.q: What is the support response time on Enterprise?
f.answer: Enterprise support has a planned support response time of 24 hours.

f.q: How much storage does the Free plan include?
f.answer: The Free plan includes limited storage.
